meta.about_atlantis: Meet the Atlantis Tours team — licensed maritime operators running Benagil cave tours and yacht cruises from Portimão since 2020.
meta.about_ay: Algarve & You brings together the best local experiences — from coastal boat tours to food, wine, and wellness across the Algarve.
meta.contact: Get in touch to ask questions or arrange a custom experience. Reach us by email, phone, or WhatsApp.

meta.terms: Terms and conditions for booking maritime experiences and tours with us in the Algarve, Portugal.
meta.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before departure on most tours. Full details on our refund and rescheduling policy.
meta.privacy: How we handle your personal data when you book tours and experiences in the Algarve. GDPR-compliant privacy practices.
meta.transfers: Private airport transfers between Faro, Lisbon, and Algarve resorts. Comfortable door-to-door service for individuals and groups.

meta.category.boats: Explore our Algarve boat tours — Benagil cave circuits, sunset cruises, speedboat adventures, and private charters departing from Portimão Marina.
meta.category.gastronomy: Taste the Algarve — traditional Portuguese dining, private chef experiences, fado nights, and curated food tours across the region.
meta.category.land-tours: Day trips from the Algarve to Lisbon, Seville, Lagos, Sagres, Silves, and Monchique. Small-group and private tour options.
meta.category.transfers: Private airport transfers between Faro, Lisbon, and Algarve resorts. Comfortable, reliable door-to-door transport.
meta.category.spa: Spa and wellness experiences in the Algarve — zen circuits, massages, and gym access at our Portimão wellness centre.
